channel.title: Latest from Android Central
channel.description: All the latest content from the Android Central team

item.title: Samsung Galaxy Watch 9 firmware leak signals launch is right around the corner
item.description: The Galaxy Watch 9 could be nearly here with a new chip and same design, but while it promises better efficiency, the unchanged battery means daily charging likely isn’t going anywhere.
item.author: techkritiko@gmail.com (Jay Bonggolto)
item.dc:creator: Jay Bonggolto

media:content.media:description: The Samsung Galaxy Watch 8.
media:content.media:text: The Samsung Galaxy Watch 8.
media:content.media:title: The Samsung Galaxy Watch 8.

item.title: I used this hidden Google Pay feature to automate credit card bill payments
item.description: Google Pay in India has a hidden feature that lets you add all credit card billers, allowing you to pay bills with the utility. This is the CRED alternative I've been waiting for in India.
item.author: harish.jonnalagadda@futurenet.com (Harish Jonnalagadda)
item.dc:creator: Harish Jonnalagadda

media:content.media:description: Google Pay home page in India showing credit card bill due
media:content.media:text: Google Pay home page in India showing credit card bill due
media:content.media:title: Google Pay home page in India showing credit card bill due

item.title: Our favorite Android gaming controller just crashed to $68 during Amazon's Big Spring Sale - but you're running out of time
item.description: The GameSir G8 Plus brings Bluetooth connectivity and more.
item.dc:creator: Zachary David

media:content.media:description: GameSir G8 Plus controller with Vivo X100 Ultra slotted in
media:content.media:text: GameSir G8 Plus controller with Vivo X100 Ultra slotted in
media:content.media:title: GameSir G8 Plus controller with Vivo X100 Ultra slotted in

item.title: Get in: Android Auto EVs see AI battery predictions in Google Maps for stress-free plans
item.description: Google Maps for Android Auto announced a major AI-powered battery-focused feature for EVs.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

media:content.media:description: Google's Android Auto announcements for CES 2024.
media:content.media:text: Google's Android Auto announcements for CES 2024.
media:content.media:title: Google's Android Auto announcements for CES 2024.

item.title: Last call! Grab a free Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra from T-Mobile before the deal ends on April 1st
item.description: T-Mobile's viral deal that gets you a free Galaxy S26 Ultra with a new line is set to end on April 1st.
item.author: patrick.farmer@futurenet.com (Patrick Farmer)
item.dc:creator: Patrick Farmer

media:content.media:description: The back of the blue Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra
media:content.media:text: The back of the blue Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra
media:content.media:title: The back of the blue Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra

item.title: Beats made my favorite workout earbuds even better with an electric Nike collab
item.description: Beats and Nike teamed up to launch a special edition variant of the Powerbeats Pro 2, and it's already my favorite audio launch of the year.
item.author: bradypsnyder@gmail.com (Brady Snyder)
item.dc:creator: Brady Snyder

media:content.media:description: The Nike Special Edition variant of the Powerbeats Pro 2 in a volt and matte black colorway.
media:content.media:text: The Nike Special Edition variant of the Powerbeats Pro 2 in a volt and matte black colorway.
media:content.media:title: The Nike Special Edition variant of the Powerbeats Pro 2 in a volt and matte black colorway.

item.title: The Pixel 11 may look exactly how I expected it would—that's not a bad thing
item.description: Pixel 11 expectations started coming to the forefront with a set of alleged renderings ahead of a (hopeful) summer launch.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

media:content.media:description: Pixel 10 with a blue Pixelsnap case
media:content.media:text: Pixel 10 with a blue Pixelsnap case
media:content.media:title: Pixel 10 with a blue Pixelsnap case

item.title: After testing the new Sony WF-1000XM6, I'm convinced they're the only earbuds you need for great sound and excellent ANC
item.description: Sony's WF-1000XM6 earbuds are their best yet, and the best ANC earbuds on the market right now.
item.author: klpmediallc@gmail.com (Tshaka Armstrong)
item.dc:creator: Tshaka Armstrong

media:content.media:description: Sony WF-1000XM6 ANC earbuds
media:content.media:text: Sony WF-1000XM6 ANC earbuds
media:content.media:title: Sony WF-1000XM6 ANC earbuds

item.title: Feeling carsick? Samsung thinks your earbuds can help
item.description: Samsung’s Hearapy app wants to replace your motion sickness pills with pure bass.
item.author: techkritiko@gmail.com (Jay Bonggolto)
item.dc:creator: Jay Bonggolto

media:content.media:description: White Samsung Galaxy Buds 4 Pro with cases
media:content.media:text: White Samsung Galaxy Buds 4 Pro with cases
media:content.media:title: White Samsung Galaxy Buds 4 Pro with cases

item.title: The 'best budget' Fitbit Inspire 3 just scored an additional 30% off during Amazon's Big Spring Sale
item.description: The Fitbit Inspire 3 is already a great budget Fitbit. $30 off doesn't hurt either.
item.dc:creator: Zachary David

media:content.media:description: Fitbit Inspire 3 Sleep Score
media:content.media:text: Fitbit Inspire 3 Sleep Score
media:content.media:title: Fitbit Inspire 3 Sleep Score

item.title: Amazon's Big Spring Sale has dropped this 65-inch Toshiba TV to only $299 — but the deals end tomorrow!
item.description: Sizes range from 43 to 75 inches, but the discount sweet spot is on the 65-inch model.
item.dc:creator: Zachary David

media:content.media:description: Toshiba C350 4K UHD
media:content.media:text: Toshiba C350 4K UHD
media:content.media:title: Toshiba C350 4K UHD

item.title: Vivo's X300 Ultra lands in China, makes the Galaxy S26 Ultra look like a joke
item.description: Vivo just launched the X300 Ultra in China, and the phone is a powerhouse like no other. With a global launch imminent, there's a lot to be excited about with this phone.
item.author: harish.jonnalagadda@futurenet.com (Harish Jonnalagadda)
item.dc:creator: Harish Jonnalagadda

media:content.media:description: Vivo X300 Ultra hands-on at MWC 2026
media:content.media:text: Vivo X300 Ultra hands-on at MWC 2026
media:content.media:title: Vivo X300 Ultra hands-on at MWC 2026

item.title: AirDrop sharing for older Samsung Galaxy devices could be here very soon
item.description: AirDrop support may soon arrive on older Samsung Galaxy devices
item.author: sanujb6@gmail.com (Sanuj Bhatia)
item.dc:creator: Sanuj Bhatia

media:content.media:description: The camera lenses on the back of a Samsung Galaxy S25 Ultra
media:content.media:text: The camera lenses on the back of a Samsung Galaxy S25 Ultra
media:content.media:title: The camera lenses on the back of a Samsung Galaxy S25 Ultra

item.title: YouTube now works with Android Auto, but not in the way you'd expect
item.description: Google has added partial YouTube support to Android Auto with new playback controls.
item.author: sanujb6@gmail.com (Sanuj Bhatia)
item.dc:creator: Sanuj Bhatia

media:content.media:description: YouTube Premium Galaxy Z Fold 3.
media:content.media:text: YouTube Premium Galaxy Z Fold 3.
media:content.media:title: YouTube Premium Galaxy Z Fold 3.

item.title: Netflix's latest price hike is here, and I’m struggling to find the value in a $27 4K plan
item.description: Netflix just raised prices again across all plans, and while it’s spending big on content and new features, you’re basically paying more for the same experience.
item.author: techkritiko@gmail.com (Jay Bonggolto)
item.dc:creator: Jay Bonggolto

media:content.media:description: Netflix app logo on a phone
media:content.media:text: Netflix app logo on a phone
media:content.media:title: Netflix app logo on a phone

item.title: Still paying for cloud storage? This NAS deal will make you reconsider
item.description: Don't want to rely on cloud storage? Now is the best time to get a NAS server and start your local storage journey, and the best starter NAS is down to its lowest price.
item.author: harish.jonnalagadda@futurenet.com (Harish Jonnalagadda)
item.dc:creator: Harish Jonnalagadda

media:content.media:description: UGREEN DH2300 and DH4300 Plus on a table
media:content.media:text: UGREEN DH2300 and DH4300 Plus on a table
media:content.media:title: UGREEN DH2300 and DH4300 Plus on a table

item.title: I put a magnetic ring on my non-wireless charging phone — here's why you should too
item.description: Who says your phone needs to support wireless charging for you to use magnetic accessories with it? Magnets let you use more than magnetic wireless chargers.
item.author: namerah.saud-fatmi@futurenet.com (Namerah Saud Fatmi)
item.dc:creator: Namerah Saud Fatmi

media:content.media:description: Honor Play 10 with a clear case, a magnetic ring sticker, and MagSafe accessories.
media:content.media:text: Honor Play 10 with a clear case, a magnetic ring sticker, and MagSafe accessories.
media:content.media:title: Honor Play 10 with a clear case, a magnetic ring sticker, and MagSafe accessories.

item.title: I always add these 6 quick settings tiles to my Android phone when setting it up for the first time
item.description: There are dozens of quick settings tiles, but here are my top six. I rely on them so much that they are the first tiles I pick when setting up a new phone.
item.author: namerah.saud-fatmi@futurenet.com (Namerah Saud Fatmi)
item.dc:creator: Namerah Saud Fatmi

media:content.media:description: Quick settings tiles on Android 16
media:content.media:text: Quick settings tiles on Android 16
media:content.media:title: Quick settings tiles on Android 16

item.title: This app made me hate today's giant Android smartphones a little less
item.description: With Quick Cursor, you can interact with UI elements on the upper half of your Android phone's screen, without having to resort to hand gymnastics.
item.author: sharmarajat@zoho.com (Rajat Sharma)
item.dc:creator: Rajat Sharma

media:content.media:description: quick cursor settings page on a motorola g04

item.title: This Samsung Galaxy S26 update makes it ultra-easy to share files with an iPhone
item.description: You can now easily share files from a Samsung Galaxy S26 to an Apple device using AirDrop.

item.title: Gemini 3.1 Flash Live is a massive boon to the AI's real-time assistance for you and me
item.description: Google's Gemini 3.1 Flash Live rolled out a noteworthy voice-based update to Gemini Live for all users.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

media:content.media:description: Google launches Gemini 3.1 Flash Live, a voice-first AI model that's much more capable of listening to user's speech, understanding it, and delivering even faster voice-based help.
media:content.media:text: Google launches Gemini 3.1 Flash Live, a voice-first AI model that's much more capable of listening to user's speech, understanding it, and delivering even faster voice-based help.
media:content.media:title: Google launches Gemini 3.1 Flash Live, a voice-first AI model that's much more capable of listening to user's speech, understanding it, and delivering even faster voice-based help.

item.title: Android 17 Beta 3 finally brings the desktop multitasking we’ve been waiting for
item.description: Android 17 Beta 3 finally delivers floating windows for any app, splits your Wi-Fi and mobile toggles, and hits platform stability.

item.title: The best 4-bay starter Plex NAS is somehow down to an all-time low — this deal won't last
item.description: The DH4300 Plus is the ideal starter NAS, and now is the best time to get your hands on it. With the NAS down to $351, it is at its lowest price.
item.author: harish.jonnalagadda@futurenet.com (Harish Jonnalagadda)
item.dc:creator: Harish Jonnalagadda

item.title: I’m saying it: The Galaxy S26 is a better 'Pixel' than the Pixel 10

item.title: I decluttered my desk with this 6-in-1 245W charger with Qi 2, and it just went on sale
item.description: Baseus has a new 6-in-1 charging station, and the Nomos NH21 has a sleek design, integrated USB-C cables, a Qi 2 charging pad, and a total power budget of 245W.

item.title: I tested UGREEN's 17-in-1 Maxidok, and it is the best Thunderbolt 5 dock around — it even gets an unbelievable launch discount
item.description: UGREEN just rolled out a Thunderbolt 5 dock, and it has everything I need in a powerful dock, including an SSD slot that holds up to 8TB SSDs.
